properties.avoid: The drug is reported to have traces of 2C-T-2 in imperfect synthesis. As a result, individuals ingesting HOT-2 may run the risk of additionally ingesting 2C-T-2, which notably has MAOI properties.
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: A rare psychedelic phenylethylamine that is the hydroxylated version and prodrug for 2C-T-2.
